task_completion.description: Verify the ground station 'Omaha_DataCenter' is configured and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Omaha_DataCenter' in the GPredict module header, ground station configuration dialogs, or the main interface.

task_completion.description: Verify transponder files for GOES 16, GOES 18, and SES-1 were created with correct frequencies in Hertz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal or text editor windows in the trajectory showing the creation of 43013.trsp, 51850.trsp, and 36516.trsp in ~/.config/Gpredict/trsp/ with DOWN_LOW=1694100000 and DOWN_LOW=11700000000.

task_completion.description: Verify an alignment module named 'GEO_Alignment' tracks the three specified satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main GPredict window should display a module named 'GEO_Alignment' containing GOES 16, GOES 18, and SES-1 in its tracking list.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard is configured for List View only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'GEO_Alignment' module should display only a tabular list of satellites. No map view or polar view should be visible in this module.

task_completion.description: Verify global preferences are set to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time displayed in the GPredict interface (e.g., top right clock or module header) should explicitly indicate 'UTC'.

task_completion.description: Verify the GPredict window is open, maximized, and focused on the GEO_Alignment module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GPredict application should take up the entire screen, and the 'GEO_Alignment' tab/window must be the active, focused element.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict GUI for module and preference configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show genuine GPredict dialog boxes (e.g., Preferences, Edit Module) being used, rather than just editing configuration files for these specific settings.

integrity.description: Verify transponder files were placed in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager screenshots must show the path ~/.config/Gpredict/trsp/ being used for the .trsp files.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is shown in the actual GPredict application, not a text editor or mocked UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot must show the standard GPredict GTK interface with its typical icons, menus, and layout, not a text file or image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Omaha_DataCenter coordinates are 41.2565 N, 95.9345 W (longitude -95.9345), altitude 332m. GOES-16 (NORAD 43013) and GOES-18 (NORAD 51850) HRIT downlink frequency is 1694100000 Hz. SES-1 (NORAD 36516) Ku_Beacon downlink frequency is 11700000000 Hz. The transponder files must use these exact values in Hertz.
